headline: AI for Customer Analytics: Segmentation, Churn Prediction, and Lifetime Value Modeling
description: AI customer analytics predicts who will churn, segments by behavior, and calculates lifetime value -- all in real-time. From Amplitude to Optimove, AI transforms raw event streams into actionable customer intelligence that drives retention, upsell, and personalization.

citation.name: Machine Learning for Customer Analytics: Churn Prediction, CLV Modeling, and Behavioral Segmentation (2024-2025 Survey)
Causal Inference and Uplift Modeling for Customer Interventions: Next-Best-Action and Incrementality Testing
